source: Dashboard consolidated web dataset generated from import_data
notes: Production dashboard handoff format. The portal reads this one file and preserves original source envelopes under data.files keyed by their relative import_data paths.

latestAlerts.title: Institutional accumulation detected in sample ownership data

pageContent.pageDescription: Institutional dashboard for short squeeze risk, market defense, shareholder intelligence, sentiment monitoring, and capital markets decision support.

commandCenter.riskNarrative: Current market conditions indicate elevated squeeze risk driven by reduced effective float, positive sentiment, and increasing borrow pressure. Internal management adjustments suggest materially higher risk than public market estimates.
managementActions: Monitor borrow fee and share availability daily.
Review upcoming catalysts and prepare board-level talking points.
Prepare IR response package for short-pressure and rumor questions.

sections.alertCenterDescription: Meaningful changes from the last 7 days.
sections.marketPressureDescription: Short interest, borrow pressure, lending conditions, and squeeze readiness in one view.
sections.marketPressureNarrative: Market pressure is summarized from short interest, lending pressure, and squeeze readiness so executives can quickly decide where to drill in.
sections.internalFloatDescription: Why management sees a different float reality than the public market.
sections.smartMoneyDescription: How institutions, insiders, and options traders are positioning.
sections.marketNarrativeDescription: Sentiment, discussion volume, and narrative momentum.
sections.forwardLookingDescription: Potential price scenarios and upcoming catalysts.
sections.aiIntelligenceDescription: Consolidated executive interpretation and recommended actions.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Executive Summary
aiIntelligence.body: CURR shows elevated market-defense risk driven by borrow pressure, internal float reduction, and constructive narrative momentum.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Risk Assessment
aiIntelligence.body: The highest risk is a catalyst occurring while borrow supply remains constrained and sentiment continues to improve.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Opportunities
aiIntelligence.body: Positive positioning, upcoming catalysts, and a lower internal float estimate create a stronger management-view risk picture than public data alone.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Recommended Actions
aiIntelligence.body: Review borrow fee daily, prepare IR response materials, and escalate material alerts to management and advisors.

aiIntelligence.title: AI Market Outlook
aiIntelligence.body: Near-term outlook remains sensitive to borrow availability, filings, ownership movement, and catalyst timing.

data.businessDescription: Demo company profile normalized for the Company Intelligence Portal import data pool.

shortInterestPercentFloat.label: SI % Float
shortInterestPercentFloat.formula: value = data.current.shortInterestPcFreeFloat; change = value * shortInterest.changePercent / 100; changePercent = shortInterest.changePercent

daysToCover.label: Days To Cover
daysToCover.formula: value = data.current.daysToCoverQuantity ?? data.daysToCover; change = latest(data.finraHistory).daysToCoverQuantity - previous(data.finraHistory).daysToCoverQuantity; changePercent = change / previous(data.finraHistory).daysToCoverQuantity * 100

borrowFee.label: Borrow Fee
borrowFee.formula: value = data.current.costToBorrowAll; change = data.current.costToBorrowAll - previous(data.all[].costToBorrowAll); changePercent = change / previous(data.all[].costToBorrowAll) * 100

borrowFee.label: Borrow Fee
borrowFee.formula: value = data.current.costToBorrowAll; change = data.current.costToBorrowAll - previous(data.all[].costToBorrowAll); changePercent = change / previous(data.all[].costToBorrowAll) * 100

sharesAvailable.label: Shares Available
sharesAvailable.formula: value = latest(data).shortAvailabilityShares; change = latest(data).shortAvailabilityShares - previous(data).shortAvailabilityShares; changePercent = change / previous(data).shortAvailabilityShares * 100

utilization.label: Utilization
utilization.formula: value = latest(data).shortAvailabilityPct; change = latest(data).shortAvailabilityPct - previous(data).shortAvailabilityPct; changePercent = change / previous(data).shortAvailabilityPct * 100

sharesAvailable.label: Shares Available
sharesAvailable.formula: value = latest(data).shortAvailabilityShares; change = latest(data).shortAvailabilityShares - previous(data).shortAvailabilityShares; changePercent = change / previous(data).shortAvailabilityShares * 100

utilization.label: Utilization
utilization.formula: value = latest(data).shortAvailabilityPct; change = latest(data).shortAvailabilityPct - previous(data).shortAvailabilityPct; changePercent = change / previous(data).shortAvailabilityPct * 100

borrowDemand.label: Borrow Demand
borrowDemand.formula: value = borrowDemand label from borrowDemandScore; change = borrowDemandScore - previousBorrowDemandScore; changePercent = change / previousBorrowDemandScore * 100

short/utilization.json.notes: No utilization sample file found; connector-ready placeholder.

short/on_loan.json.notes: Demo trend data added for Lending Pressure chart until the Ortex on-loan connector provides daily records.

shortScore.label: Short Score
shortScore.formula: value = round(latest(data).score); change = round(latest(data).score) - previous(data).score; changePercent = change / previous(data).score * 100

shortScoreLevel.label: Short Score Level
shortScoreLevel.formula: Extreme if score >= 80; High if >= 65; Moderate if >= 40; otherwise Low

sentiment/social_mentions.json.notes: Demo social-media mention scan for portal sentiment workflow.

data.author: marketwatcher_ai
data.comment: CURR is getting more attention as traders look for small-cap fintech names tied to AI and digital asset rails.

data.author: FlowReader
data.comment: Volume is building again. Watching whether CURR can hold above VWAP into the close.

data.author: smallcapIR
data.comment: Need to read the latest filing before assuming this move is only retail momentum.

data.author: riskdesk
data.comment: Borrow pressure is still a concern. CURR needs stronger fundamental confirmation to reduce squeeze-only speculation.

data.author: IRBreakdown
data.comment: The company story is easier to understand when framed around payment infrastructure and digital asset settlement.

data.author: CapitalMarketsOps
data.comment: CURR needs consistent disclosure cadence so investors can separate operating progress from trading volatility.

data.author: gamma_notes
data.comment: Put/call skew is worth watching. CURR may remain volatile if options positioning stays defensive.

data.author: TapeFocus
data.comment: Strong relative volume and a cleaner narrative could keep CURR on watchlists this week.

data.author: DueDiligenceDesk
data.comment: Market cap is still small enough for big moves, but the business model needs more detail in upcoming updates.

data.author: holderwatch
data.comment: Institutional ownership changes are the part of the CURR story I would watch most closely.

data.author: SmallCapClips
data.comment: CURR is showing up in more retail trading clips today, mostly around the fintech and AI angle.

data.author: DisclosureFirst
data.comment: CURR should keep messaging precise. Any vague PR could invite volatility rather than long-term holders.

internal_float/float_adjustments.json.source: Calculated from public market data and internal management input
internal_float/float_adjustments.json.sourcePlatform: Public Market Data + Internal Management Input
internal_float/float_adjustments.json.notes: Calculated estimates for internal analysis only.

reports/dashboard_metrics.json.notes: Precomputed dashboard values intended to remove frontend calculation from dashboard cards.

commandCenter.formula: overallRiskScore = round(marketPressureScore * 0.35 + internalAdjustedSqueezeScore * 0.25 + internalFloatImpactScore * 0.15 + narrativeScore * 0.10 + smartMoneyScore * 0.15)

price/technical_summary.json.source: Derived from price and stock score samples

commandCenter.formula: overallRiskScore = round(marketPressureScore * 0.35 + internalAdjustedSqueezeScore * 0.25 + internalFloatImpactScore * 0.15 + narrativeScore * 0.10 + smartMoneyScore * 0.15)

backendNotes.requiredUpdateCadence: Update whenever any dashboard input changes.
backendNotes.displayContract: Keep data.dashboard, data.pageContent, data.files, and data.derived.dashboardPage keys present.
backendNotes.fileMapRule: data.files keys must match the original import_data relative paths used by the portal.
